name: Thilo von Hohenstein
summary: Highly experienced Embedded Systems Engineer with over 10 years of expertise in developing safety-critical firmware for automotive and industrial applications. Proven track record in leading cross-functional teams to deliver high-performance, real-time systems while adhering to strict ISO 26262 standards.

experience.title: Senior Embedded Software Engineer
experience.description: Lead the development of powertrain control modules, focusing on low-level driver optimization and real-time operating system integration for electric vehicle platforms.

experience.title: Embedded Systems Developer
experience.description: Designed and implemented firmware for autonomous warehouse robots, utilizing ARM Cortex-M architectures and optimizing power consumption for long-term battery operation.

experience.title: Junior Firmware Engineer
experience.description: Developed embedded drivers for industrial pressure sensors and assisted in the migration of legacy codebases to modern C standards.

education.degree: Master of Science in Electrical Engineering
